reference: Dear patient, you have a hematoma over your eye post-trauma that has partially resolved. There is nothing to worry about, as it will resolve over time. If in doubt, a local ultrasound of the swelling will confirm the diagnosis. Taking Chymoral Forte twice a day before meals will help in the early reduction of swelling.
text: Be a patient. You have a hematoma over your eye post-trauma that has partially resolved. There is nothing to worry about, as it will resolve over time. If in doubt, a local ultrasound of the swelling will confirm the diagnosis. Taking primal water twice a day before meals will help in the early reduction of swelling.
